DISCOVERY 610, JENNIFER TORBOHN FOR DR. MILTON O'BRIEN. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO ENFORCE THE PRIOR ORDER IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN FAILED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION BY SEPTEMBER 7, 2004 AS ORDERED BY THE COURT ON AUGUST 19, 2004. PURSUANT TO THE PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT, THE JULY 7, 2004 SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES WILL BE DEEMED FINAL AND COMPLETE AND PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN IS PRECLUDED FROM INTRODUCING ANY ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE NOT INCLUDED IN THE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS SILVIA PARRA AND EVA PARRA'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #1) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET #1). LAW AND MOTION 610, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY & MONETARY SANCTIONS - ARGUED AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR MONETARY AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLIANTIFF DISOBEYED THE PREVIOUS ORDER OF JUNE 8, 2004 BY FAILING TO PROVIDE SUBSTANTIVE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION BY JUNE 25, 2004. THE RESERVATION OF RIGHTS AND GENERAL OBJECTIONS FILED WITH THE JULY 7, 2004 SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES ARE STRICKEN. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDE VERIFIED SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS BY AUGUST 31, 2004. IF NO SUCH RESPONSES WILL BE DEEMED FINAL AND COMPLETE AND PLAINTIFF IS PRECLUDED FROM INTRODUCING ANY ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE NOT INCLUDED IN THE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS SILVIA AND EVA PARRA'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET #1, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION SET #1. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,536.30 TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
